notes:
Overall a gold as it runs well but some tweaks were needed. 
Disable D3d11 by adding "PROTON_VARIABLE=1 nod3d11" to launch options
Go to the game install directory, and edit game.xml. Full screen needs to be changed from true to false, then manually enter your resolution. My task bar overlapped so I used 1920*1000 for 1080p and its fine.

Mods are stored in /SteamLibrary/steamapps/compatdata/220260/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/My Games
title: Farming Simulator 2013 Titanium Edition
